name: claude-code-harness
description: Public supported Cursor adapter for Claude Code Harness Plan, Work, Review, and Release workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Public supported Harness workflow adapter for Cursor
interface.longDescription: Use Claude Code Harness skills in Cursor for evidence-backed planning, implementation, review, release, setup, sync, and team execution workflows. Cursor is supported after live H4 (2026-07-17) and H7 release-preflight fail-closed gate; no FS jail — containment is harness-side (docs/CURSOR_INTEGRATION.md).
defaultPrompt: Use harness-plan to plan this change.
Use harness-work to execute the next Plans.md task.
